_comment: Personas drive permission trimming. 'acl' on each fixture is matched against the persona id. A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR contains 'all'. 'restricted'/'internal' sensitivity is informational; the acl is the enforced gate. new_pm = full program leadership view; quality_engineer = engineering/quality but NOT customer-restricted threads; contractor = least privilege (no restricted, no commercial).

personas.label: Sam Ortiz — Incoming Program Manager
personas.description: Full program leadership view including customer-restricted escalations and commercial supplier terms.

personas.label: Raj Patel — Senior Quality Engineer
personas.description: Sees all internal engineering, quality, and supplier-risk signals, but NOT customer-facing restricted escalations or confidential commercial agreements.

personas.label: Diego Salas — Contract Test Engineer (vendor)
personas.description: Least-privilege vendor. Sees only non-sensitive program signals; cannot see customer escalations, supplier risk register, or commercial agreements.

personas.label: Marcus Reed — Director (escalation)
personas.description: Executive escalation view. Sees everything new_pm sees.
